name: 龍蝦通用核心飼料 (L0)
description: 所有工作區的基底變異層。定義行為守則、專業語調與標準思維狀態機，確保任何情境下的穩定起點。
description_en: Baseline mutation layer for all workspaces. Defines behavioral boundaries, professional tone, and standard thought state machines.

name: 龍蝦確定性代理框架
description: 決策邏輯約束協議。為複雜任務實施嚴苛的邏輯分支與可重複執行路徑，消除隨機性。
description_en: Decision logic constraint protocol. Enforces strict logical branching for complex tasks to eliminate execution randomness.

name: 反幻覺邏輯護欄
description: 事實查核安全護欄。強制代理在輸出前進行交叉驗證，需協同 Browse/Search 技能阻斷事實幻覺。
description_en: Fact-checking security guardrails. Forces pre-output cross-validation, syncing with Browse/Search skills to block hallucinations.

name: 工具驅動狀態機
description: 工具依賴型狀態機。將代理行為鎖定為特定工具輸出驅動的流轉邏輯，避免跨越權限猜測。
description_en: Tool-dependent state machine. Locks agent behavior into transition logic driven purely by tool outputs.

name: 自主研究代理
description: 自主研究行為掛載。注入端到端的研究執行協議，指導代理如何自動化地收集、綜合並總結資訊。
description_en: Autonomous research behavioral hook. Injects end-to-end research protocols detailing how to collect, synthesize, and summarize data.

name: AI SEO 內容工廠
description: SEO 內容流水線約束。賦予代理嚴格的關鍵字優化與內容生產標準 SOP，需搭配 Search 技能使用。
description_en: SEO content pipeline constraints. Imparts strict SOPs for keyword optimization and content generation, best paired with Search skills.

name: 聯盟行銷自動化
description: 聯盟行銷狀態機。引導代理執行產品分析到多通路分發的標準化轉換流程。
description_en: Affiliate marketing state machine. Guides agents through a standardized funnel from product analysis to multi-channel distribution.

name: 軟體專案架構代理
description: 軟體架構實施協議。為工作區注入從系統設計到代碼生成的標準化開發邏輯與規範框架。
description_en: Software architecture implementation protocols. Injects standardized development logic from system design to code generation.

name: 代碼除錯代理
description: 語義除錯護欄。強制工作區採用追蹤分析與錯誤定位的標準化 Debug 流程。
description_en: Semantic debugging guardrails. Forces workspaces to adopt standard trace analysis and bug localization workflows.

name: 文檔自動生成器
description: 文檔逆向工程邏輯。規範代理如何從源代碼中萃取模式並結構化生成 API 參考資料。
description_en: Documentation reverse-engineering logic. Standardizes how agents extract patterns to generate structured API references.

name: 市場研究自動化
description: 市場趨勢監控狀態機。指導代理如何持續且準確地從多方來源提取消費者情緒與經濟指標。
description_en: Market trend monitoring state machine. Guides structured extraction of consumer sentiment and economic indicators.

name: 競爭情報代理
description: 競品分析協議。為代理植入系統性的競品功能差距對比與策略追蹤思維。
description_en: Competitive gap analysis protocol. Implants systematic thinking for comparing opponent features and strategic pivots.

name: 數據採集代理
description: 大規模數據採集約束。規範代理在執行分佈式爬蟲任務時的結構化資料提取邏輯。
description_en: Large-scale data collection constraints. Standardizes structured data extraction logic for distributed scraping tasks.

name: 多代理協作調度員
description: 多代理協作調度員邏輯。賦予父代理任務拆解與階層化分發的調度與監管思維。
description_en: Multi-agent coordinator logic. Empowers parent agents with task breakdown and hierarchical delegation workflows.

name: 數據分析工作流
description: 數據科學工作流約束。強制代理在處理原始數據時，遵守清洗、建模與視覺化的標準管線。
description_en: Data science workflow constraints. Enforces strict pipelines for cleaning, modeling, and visualizing raw datasets.

name: 語義記憶增強器
description: 長期記憶檢索協議。優化代理對於知識庫與過去對話的查詢依賴，提升 RAG 架構準確度。
description_en: Long-term memory retrieval protocol. Optimizes agent reliance on knowledge bases to increase RAG accuracy.

name: 系統協議執行官
description: 最高權限系統合規官。在工作區內部署最高層級的安全與架構標準監控器。
description_en: Root-level compliance enforcer. Deploys the maximum tier of security and architectural monitoring within the workspace.

name: 潛在客戶自動開發
description: 高價值潛客識別邏輯。注入社交網路分析準則，指導代理如何自動化辨識並接觸潛在客戶。
description_en: High-value lead identification logic. Injects social network analysis criteria to automatically discover and engage leads.

name: 社群內容流量引擎
description: 病毒式社群內容狀態機。規範代理如何分析平台趨勢並產出高擴散能力的內容模組。
description_en: Viral social content state machine. Standardizes how agents analyze platform trends to spin up high-virality content.

name: 測試套件架構師
description: 測試治具構建協議。指導代理如何根據系統需求，利用測試框架建立具覆蓋率的測試例。
description_en: Test fixture creation protocol. Directs agents to construct high-coverage test cases using target testing frameworks.

name: 威脅情報監控員
description: 網路安全掃描邏輯。指派嚴苛的威脅情報監控標準，讓代理能持續且準確地識別系統漏洞。
description_en: Cybersecurity scanning logic. Assigns strict threat intelligence monitoring standards for continuous vulnerability identification.

name: 視覺內容審計代理
description: 視覺合規審計協議。指導代理如何利用跨模態能力進行像素級的 UI/UX 設計驗證。
description_en: Visual compliance auditing protocol. Directs agents to utilize cross-modal capabilities for pixel-level UI/UX validation.

name: 語音指令邏輯提取器
description: 語音降噪與邏輯萃取器。強制代理將模糊不清的語音任務，重構為具備執行條件的結構化命令。
description_en: Voice de-noiser and logic extractor. Forces agents to reconstruct fuzzy voice tasks into definitive structured commands.

name: PII 自動脫敏護欄
description: PII 強制脫敏安全層。在回傳或處理資料前，強制攔截並隱藏所有的敏感個人資訊 (遵循 2026 法規)。
description_en: Mandatory PII masking security layer. Intercepts and occludes sensitive personal info prior to data processing (2026 compliant).

name: 跨國合規執行包裹器
description: 跨國合規執行包裹器。內建全球各地法規邊界，引導代理的功能呼叫絕不越過合法界線。
description_en: Global compliance execution wrapper. Built-in regulatory boundaries preventing agent tool calls from exceeding legal limits.

name: 法律條文精算師
description: 極限法律邊界測試協議。要求代理套用嚴謹的法理邏輯分析合約風險，絕不妥協模糊地帶。
description_en: Extreme legal boundary testing protocol. Demands strict jurisprudential logic for contract risk analysis without compromise.

name: 醫學文獻與藥理綜述助手
description: 生醫文獻綜述約束。引入嚴格的醫學資料庫交叉比對標準，確保文獻證據等級達標。
description_en: Biomedical literature review constraints. Introduces rigorous medical database cross-referencing to ensure high-evidence standards.

name: 意圖深度釐清器
description: 深層意圖釐清狀態機。當收到模糊指令時，強制阻斷執行並轉向多重選項生成，消除偏誤。
description_en: Deep intent clarifier state machine. Blocks execution upon ambiguous instructions, forcing the generation of multiple clarifying options.
